function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest invoice linked to the ops manager at the tax firm.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft written successfully; verification checks pass (single attachment so ordering rule satisfied). Next required inbox workflow step is deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Created one outbound email draft record in 60_outbox/outbox with the requested oldest Claudia-linked invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task fully completed: processed oldest inbox item, created outbound draft, and deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the request.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by preparing a reply draft with the oldest invoice linked to the tax-firm ops manager (Claudia Reiter) attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS in each entered folder, used inbox-email header as canonical sender metadata, resolved recipient/entity via canonical cast primary_contact_email, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical sender verification succeeded (00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md from miles@novak.example matched 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email). Canonical ops manager resolution identified Claudia Reiter in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. Finance lookup found the oldest Claudia-linked invoice as 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md. An outbound draft was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md with that attachment, and the processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.
